description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to all branches and tags matching v*.*.*, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch with an optional force-rebuild input. The workflow has two jobs: build and CI. The build job runs on ubuntu-22.04, generates a cache key based on the force-rebuild input and file hashes, and uses the cache to store and restore lib directory contents. The CI job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04, macos-11, and windows-2022 with Node.js 16, depends on the build job, and performs setup, cache restoration, dependency installation, testing, and publishing to NPM if a tag is pushed.
